title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: WILSONVILLE COMMUNITY CENTER DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in day space to go inside out of the cold to warm up temporarily throughout the winter season. Provides access to Wi-Fi, coffee, tea, and computers. Lunch is served three days a week. 7965 SW Wilsonville Road Wilsonville, OR 97070 Eligibility: Varies by site Hours: Center: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Lunch: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday noon (503) 682-3727 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 682-3727 Main phone Main phone (503) 682-3727 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Call ahead or visit website to confirm hours. FEES: Center: None Lunch: $3.50 for age 60 and older, $4.25 for age 59 and younger DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas County Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WILSONVILLE COMMUNITY CENTER
